user_public.title: User Public Profile
user_public.description: Public profile details, accessible by authorized readers.

user_private.title: User Private Information
user_private.description: Isolated collection for personal information to maintain absolute security boundaries and PII protection.

receiveAlerts.description: Preference for real-time push/in-app alert updates

favorite_pair.title: Favorite Currency Pair
favorite_pair.description: Bookmarks for user's favorite currency conversion combinations.

userId.description: UID of the user who saves the pair

rate_alert.title: Rate Alert
rate_alert.description: User-defined alerts for specific exchange rate limits.

userId.description: Owner UID of this rate alert

targetRate.description: The rate value target to trigger alert

condition.description: Condition check: whether rate is above or below targetRate

isTriggered.description: Whether the alert has been triggered already

triggeredRate.description: Rate value when alert was triggered

users/{userId}/public/profile.description: Publicly visible aspects of user profiles.

users/{userId}/private/info.description: Sensitive isolated user demographics and credentials for strictly private retrieval only.

favorites/{favoriteId}.description: User personal favorites list records indexed with dynamic rate checks.

alerts/{alertId}.description: Live custom threshold notifications and trigger definitions.
